# Drive Before Buy

Drive Before Buy is a car-shopping decision site focused on using a weekend rental as a practical platform test before buying a vehicle.

Canonical site: https://drivebeforebuy.com/

Key pages:
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/weekend-test-drive-checklist/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/how-to-find-a-similar-rental-car/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/weekend-rental-cost-vs-buyers-remorse/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/used-car-platform-test/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/rent-before-buying-an-ev/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/rent-before-buying-an-suv/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/rent-before-buying-a-minivan/
- https://drivebeforebuy.com/rent-before-buying-a-truck/

Editorial posture:
- Decision support for car shoppers, not model-specific reviews.
- No invented rental prices, vehicle prices, or trim claims.
- Affiliate-supported rental links may appear, but the checklist and guidance should remain useful without booking through this site.
